principles.hook: Headline must stop the scroll — specific number, bold claim, or urgent question
principles.promise: One pin = one clear idea. Don't overload.
principles.visual_answer: Pin should teach, compare, warn, or calculate — utility over decoration
principles.mobile_first: All text readable at 200px wide on phone screen
principles.premium_look: Clean fintech dashboard style — not Canva template, not AI slop
principles.click_reason: User must know exactly what clicking gives them — 'Calculate yours free'

big-number-answer.name: Big Number Answer Pin
big-number-answer.purpose: Give a direct, specific number-based answer to a financial question

layout.top_20pct: Section header: '🏠 Home Affordability' or category label, small QFINHUB mark
layout.middle_15pct: BIG HEADLINE — 48-56px bold, 2 lines max, high contrast
layout.center_35pct: GIANT NUMBER CARD — the answer, e.g. '$300K–$400K' in 80-96px bold, centered on a clean card with subtle shadow, accent color for numbers
layout.below_card: 2-3 assumptions in small text (16-18px): 'Based on 28% DTI, 20% down, 6.5% rate'
layout.bottom_20pct: CTA button: 'Calculate Yours Free →' or 'Get Your Exact Number →', rounded pill, accent color fill, white text, 28-32px

big-number-answer.typography: Sans-serif bold for headline, medium for assumptions, semibold for CTA, all 1.2 line-height

split-decision.name: Split Decision Pin
split-decision.purpose: Compare two financial options side-by-side with clear winner

layout.middle_15pct: HEADLINE: 'X vs Y: Which [saves more / pays off faster / costs less]?' — 44-52px bold
layout.center_45pct: TWO CARDS SIDE BY SIDE (420px each with 20px gap): left card = Option A, right card = Option B. Each card: option name (20px), key stat (36px bold), 2 'Best if...' bullets (14px). Winner gets ★ badge and subtle glow border.
layout.below_cards: Victory bar: 'Winner: Avalanche saves $2,347 more' — 18px, accent background strip
layout.bottom_15pct: CTA: 'Compare Your Numbers →' or 'Try Both Free →'

dos: One key stat per side (not 10 numbers)

checklist.name: Checklist Pin
checklist.purpose: Make the pin saveable — users save checklists to reference later

layout.middle_15pct: HEADLINE: 'Before You [Action], Check These [N] Numbers' — 44-52px bold
layout.center_50pct: CHECKLIST CARDS stacked vertically with 10px gaps. Each item: number (1-7 in circle), label (20-22px semibold), optional one-line explainer (14px gray). Items vertically spaced for readability.
layout.bottom_15pct: CTA: 'Use the Free Calculator →' or 'Calculate All [N] Free →'

mistake.name: Mistake Pin
mistake.purpose: Create curiosity + saves by warning about costly errors

layout.middle_15pct: HEADLINE: '[N] [Topic] Mistakes That [Cost You / Make It Unaffordable]' — 44-52px bold
layout.center_50pct: MISTAKE CARDS (vertical stack). Each: ⚠ icon + mistake title (18-20px bold) + cost/solution (14px). Alternating slight background strips for visual rhythm. Red/amber accent border left side.
layout.bottom_15pct: CTA: 'Check Your Numbers →' or 'Avoid These → Use Free Calculator'

donts: No stock photos of stressed people

calculator-result.name: Mini Calculator Result Pin
calculator-result.purpose: Show a realistic calculator output — feels like a peek at the actual tool

layout.center_40pct: CALCULATOR RESULT CARD — clean white card with: INPUTS row (3 items, small 14px gray labels + 18px values), thin divider line, RESULT row (BIG number 64-72px bold in accent color), small 'per month' / 'total' label
layout.below_result: Alternative scenario tease: 'Pay off 3 years early? Save $1,759 →' (16px, accent color link style)
